# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-stage Deploy Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

concurrency:
  group: multi-stage-deploy-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  ARTIFACT_NAME: build-artifacts

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      actions: read
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build artifacts
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p dist
          echo "Build output generated at $(date -u)" > dist/build-info.txt
          tar -czf dist/package.tgz dist/build-info.txt

      - name: Upload artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: |
            dist/**
          if-no-files-found: error
          retention-days: 14

  deploy_staging:
    name: Deploy (Staging)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    environment:
      name: staging
    permissions:
      contents: read
      actions: read
    steps:
      - name: Checkout (for deployment scripts)
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ./_artifacts

      - name: Deploy to staging
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          ls -la ./_artifacts
          chmod +x ./scripts/deploy-staging.sh
          ./scripts/deploy-staging.sh ./_artifacts

  deploy_production:
    name: Deploy (Production)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: deploy_staging
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    environment:
      name: production
    permissions:
      contents: read
      actions: read
    steps:
      - name: Checkout (for deployment scripts)
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ./_artifacts

      - name: Deploy to production
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          ls -la ./_artifacts
          chmod +x ./scripts/deploy-production.sh
          ./scripts/deploy-production.sh ./_artifacts
